welcome.title: Welcome{{name}}!
welcome.body: Three quick steps to set up your TaskMgr workspace:
welcome.steps: 1. Create a task type · 2. Add a first client · 3. Create your first work order

taskType.title: Create a task type
taskType.subtitle: Work orders are classified by type. You can add more later from Settings → Task types.
taskType.name: Name
taskType.prefixHint: The prefix is used as a tag in work-order numbers — e.g. REP-2026-0001.
taskType.errorGeneric: Failed to create the task type

client.title: Add a first client
client.subtitle: A client is the recipient of work orders. You can add more on the fly during work-order creation.

done.title: All set!
done.subtitle: Your workspace is configured. Create your first work order to see the complete flow.
